Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: User with admin privileges to manage registrations and appoint new admins

addedBy.description: UID of the admin who added this person

agreedToShare.description: Whether user agrees to share data with CIPA committee

dateObservation.description: Date of observation in dd/MM/yyyy format

isIdentified.description: Whether user wants to identify themselves

name.description: Name of the person if identified

email.description: Email of the person if identified

phone.description: Phone of the person if identified

respondedBy.description: Who took action on this registration

Area.title: Area
Area.description: Operating departments and sectors managed dynamically by CIPA admins

name.description: Name of the sector or yard

SystemLog.title: SystemLog
SystemLog.description: System action log recording updates, deletions, and management events

email.description: Email of the admin who performed the action

description.description: Detailed details or metadata of the action

registrations/{registrationId}.description: User submitted CIPA registrations and SAC messages

areas/{areaId}.description: Dynamic operating areas and sectors for the submission forms

system_logs/{logId}.description: System audit and operation logs for safety verification
